parameters.content:
## Schedule and meal generation

Triggering the workflow and creating the weekly meal plan.

## Meal plan email workflow

Fetching meals, normalizing data, emailing and handling user responses.

## Shopping list creation

Retrieving recipe data and building a shopping list in Mealie.

## Create a meal plan with Mealie and generate a smart shopping list

### How it works

- Starts on a schedule to generate a week's worth of meals.
- Sends an email with the meal plan and handles user responses.
- Creates a shopping list in Mealie based on chosen recipes.
- Allows optional removal of a random meal from the plan.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Configure the Schedule Trigger with desired frequency and timezone.
- [ ] Set up Mealie API credentials (IP, port, authentication) in the HTTP Request nodes.
- [ ] Enter Gmail account details for the Send Gmail node.

### Customization

Adjust the "Generate Next 7 Days" code node to change how dates are calculated or modify the email template in the Gmail node.
